consumables.name: Minor Salve of Mending
consumables.description: A crude poultice brewed from cave moss and boiled tallow. It stings going on, but knits torn flesh with surprising speed.

consumables.name: Alchemist's Restoring Draught
consumables.description: A thick amber liquid that smells of burnt copper and fennel. The alchemist who brewed it swore it could mend a cracked ribcage.

consumables.name: Paradox of Recovery
consumables.description: A vial of liquid that heals all wounds — yet to be fully healed, you must first believe you were never injured. The logic is unsound; the medicine is not.

consumables.name: Drops of Lucidity
consumables.description: Three cerulean drops distilled from rainwater collected during a lunar paradox. Restores clarity to a fatigued mind.

consumables.name: Philosopher's Ink
consumables.description: An iridescent tincture said to be distilled from the margins of unfinished treatises. Floods the mind with borrowed inspiration.

consumables.name: Omniscience in a Bottle
consumables.description: Supposedly contains the complete knowledge of a now-extinct school of thought. Drinking it feels like remembering everything you never learned.

consumables.name: Panacea of Wholeness
consumables.description: A swirling dual-layered elixir — gold on top, silver beneath. Restores both body and spirit in a single swallow.

consumables.name: Tincture of Iron Will
consumables.description: A bitter draught brewed from ground lodestone and ox marrow. Your muscles remember strength they never had.

consumables.name: Synaptic Spark Elixir
consumables.description: Distilled lightning in a glass vial. The jolt rewires your neural pathways into something faster and sharper — temporarily.

consumables.name: Tears of Empathy
consumables.description: Collected from a saint who wept for the suffering of strangers. Drinking them fills you with unshakeable compassion and emotional fortitude.

consumables.name: Sorites Tonic
consumables.description: One sip is nothing. Two sips are still nothing. After twenty sips — you are undeniably stronger. The heap has been assembled.

consumables.name: Tortoise Shell Extract
consumables.description: Oil rendered from the shell of an ancient tortoise who outlived every predator through sheer stubbornness. Thickens the skin and dulls incoming pain.

consumables.name: Achilles' Fury Philtre
consumables.description: A crimson stimulant that burns going down. Named for the hero who chose a short, glorious life — it makes every strike count while it lasts.

consumables.name: Barber's Cleansing Tonic
consumables.description: Shaves away conditions that don't remove themselves. The logical impossibility resolves into relief — all negative effects fade.

consumables.name: Sophist's Firebomb
consumables.description: A clay pot filled with volatile rhetoric-fuel. Shatters on impact, engulfing the target in flames born from heated argument.

consumables.name: Dialectic Grenade
consumables.description: A hollow iron sphere packed with compressed contradictions. When it detonates, thesis meets antithesis — and the target meets the floor.

consumables.name: Vial of Curry's Venom
consumables.description: If this poison harms you, then it spreads. The conditional is vacuously true. The conclusion is inevitably, recursively toxic.

consumables.name: Lazarus Philtre
consumables.description: Brewed from the last breath of a philosopher who proved death was merely a category error. Revives the fallen with modest vigour.

consumables.name: Bottled Zeno's Paradox
consumables.description: A shimmering potion that slows incoming damage — each blow must travel half the remaining distance, then half again, approaching zero.

consumables.name: Essence of Bootstrap
consumables.description: A self-referential elixir — drinking it gives you the strength to have brewed it in the first place. The causal loop tastes like anise.

consumables.name: Twilight Restorative
consumables.description: Neither fully a health potion nor a mana draught — it exists in the grey area between categories. Restores a moderate amount of both.

consumables.name: Fermi's Smoke Bomb
consumables.description: Where did you go? The paradox of your existence — you should be detectable, yet no evidence of you can be found. Grants a brief defensive surge.

consumables.name: Observer's Collapse Pill
consumables.description: A tiny black capsule. Swallowing it collapses probability around your attacks — for a brief window, the deadliest outcomes are the only outcomes.

consumables.name: Heap of Healing Grain
consumables.description: One grain heals nothing. A thousand grains still seem like nothing. Yet somehow this pouch of medicinal grain restores a modest amount of health.
